transcription.text: what is the mystery of bus 509 why are these three people on it a businessman a middle-aged woman and the man who keeps his eyes closed mystery there's really no mystery listen on a 200-mile trip like this the bus gives me a chance to work no car to park either I'm visiting my children it's so safe and comfortable to go by Greyhound I'm a lazy kind of guy like to just sit back relax and grab a nap there's no mystery about why people go Greyhound remember and leave the driving to us in a Greyhound bus lucky in a Greyhound bus
